title: Decadent Lo Mein
description: A rich and savory Chinese-inspired noodle dish loaded with vegetables and meat. Perfect for a comforting evening meal.
instructions: Cook Lo Mein Noodles according to package instructions.
Heat Vegetable Oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add Ground Pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add Shredded Carrots, Sliced Mushrooms, and Diced Bell Peppers to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add Soy Sauce, Oyster Sauce, and cooked Lo Mein Noodles to the skillet. Stir-fry everything together.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter. Garnish with Scallions and Sesame Seeds.
Optional: You can also add other vegetables, such as chopped broccoli or snap peas, to the stir-fry.
You can also use different types of protein, such as chicken or tofu, in place of the Ground Pork.
For an added crunch, sprinkle chopped nuts or seeds on top of the noodle mixture before serving.
For a spicy kick, add some diced jalapenos or red pepper flakes to the stir-fry.
To make the dish more substantial, add some diced cooked chicken or beef to the noodle mixture.
